basic_details.job_title: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 36 Posts
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Medical College & Hospital Teaching Faculty (Super Specialty Department) Notification 2026 has been released on 02 June 2026 on the official website of ESIC under Advertisement No. 134-A-14/13/Roster/2016-Admin. A total of 36 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: As per latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines, NMC Notification (30/06/2025) on "Medical Institutions (Qualification of Faculty) Regulations 2025" will apply

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Professor - Anaesthesiology (with Surgical Super Speciality)

selection_process: Based on academic credentials and interview performance

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies released by ESIC?
faq.answer: ESIC has released a total of 36 vacancies for Teaching Faculty (Super Specialty Department) posts. These positions are available on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ESIC Teaching Faculty posts is scheduled for 08 June 2026. Candidates must report on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for the ESIC Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria are as per the latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines, specifically referencing the NMC Notification (30/06/2025) on "Medical Institutions (Qualification of Faculty) Regulations 2025".

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the ESIC Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Teaching Faculty posts is 69 years. There are no specific minimum age limits mentioned for most posts.

faq.question: Q5. How can candidates apply for these ESIC vacancies?
faq.answer: The application mode for these vacancies is Walk-in. Eligible candidates need to attend the interview at the specified venue on the given date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500 for General/OBC category candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the ESIC Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The salary varies depending on the post. Assistant Professors can expect a consolidated pay of ₹1,48,669/- per month, Associate Professors ₹1,73,045/- per month, and Professors ₹2,60,226/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the ESIC Medical College & Hospital located?
faq.answer: The ESIC Medical College & Hospital is located in Faridabad, Haryana, with the pincode 121001.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on academic credentials and interview performance. Candidates are advised to prepare well for the interview.
